benefits.description: lost almost 20 lbs while maintaining caloric intake of approximately 1700 cals

side_effects.description: appetite suppression so strong that unable to complete full protocol; feels too full to eat; reduced to 3mg due to difficulty consuming adequate protein and water

protocol_notes: On Retatrutide since April 22 (approximately 3 months at time of post on 2025-07-22). Splits dose throughout week; experimented with 1.3 mg on M&W but had to reduce back to 3 mg due to excessive appetite suppression making it difficult to meet nutritional goals.
